title: MYMULIKE Liquid for Corn removers, Corn Removers for feet Extra Strength, Fast Acting Foot Corn Remover, Foot Corn Pain Relief, 15ML Liquid with 15PCS Cushions 10PCS Swabs
features: 【Maximum Strength Corn Removers】This corn remover liquid is formulated with a variety of Chinese herbal ingredients. It can quickly and effectively remove corn and other common skin problems, repair damaged skin on the feet, and maintain skin health.

【Mild and safe】The addition of Chinese herbal ingredients allows this corn remover liquid to remove corn with maximum strength while also protecting sensitive skin, reducing irritation, and giving you the most comfortable experience.

【Easy To Use】Our corn removal for feet comes with a dedicated applicator brush that makes it easy to apply to affected areas accurately. The corn pads that come with the product can provide friction relief and reduce the pressure caused by corn irritation.
【Widely Applicable】This corn remover liquid can be used on most parts of the body (big toes, heels, feet, hands, or any other part). Suitable for Plantar, Common, Corn and Callus Remover.
Process: Repeat this procedure once or twice daily as needed for up to 14 days (until corn/callus is removed).
